---
title: "Hermaphrodites with Attitude debut issue"
description: "The first newsletter I issued"
date: 2026-06-27
image: /images/rudolph.png
image-alt: "disfigured rudolph the red-nosed reindeer"
categories: [intersex]
---

Click the title to view the pdf.

Chase, C. [Hermaphrodites with Attitude, Winter 1994](/files/hwa_winter1994.pdf). (1994).


<a href="/files/hwa_winter1994.pdf">Download pdf</a>




```{=html}
<iframe src="/files/hwa_winter1994.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```
